requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to the Swedish grid must comply with SS-EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or SS-EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), the SIS-adopted European standards specifying requirements for generating plants connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. National grid-code requirements set by Svenska kraftnät (the Swedish transmission system operator) and overseen by the Energy Markets Inspectorate (Ei) also apply, alongside the relevant DSO connection rules. At the EU level, Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above the thresholds defined for Sweden, covering fault ride-through, frequency response, and reactive power exchange.
summary.zh: 接入瑞典电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合SS-EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或SS-EN 50549-2（中压）——由SIS采用的欧洲标准，规定了并联接入公共配电网的发电装置的电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力、孤岛保护及重新并网要求。同时须遵守由Svenska kraftnät（瑞典输电系统运营商）设定、并由能源市场监察局（Ei）监督的国家电网规程，以及相关配电网运营商（DSO）接入规则。欧盟层面，欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）对超过瑞典规定阈值的发电模块设定了具有约束力的故障穿越、频率响应和无功功率交换要求。
summary.zht: 接入瑞典電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合SS-EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或SS-EN 50549-2（中壓）——由SIS採用的歐洲標準，規定了並聯接入公共配電網的發電裝置的電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率能力、孤島保護及重新並網要求。同時須遵守由Svenska kraftnät（瑞典輸電系統運營商）設定、並由能源市場監察局（Ei）監督的國家電網規程，以及相關配電網運營商（DSO）接入規則。歐盟層面，歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）對超過瑞典規定閾值的發電模組設定了具有約束力的故障穿越、頻率響應和無功功率交換要求。

standards_or_laws: Svenska kraftnät grid-code requirements (SVK regulations / EIFS) for grid connection
Energy Markets Inspectorate (Ei / Energimarknadsinspektionen) oversight of connection conditions

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Power Station Connected to Power System) is sometimes referenced for inverter grid-connection behaviour. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），规定了PCS的电气性能、并网保护、孤岛检测及通信接口要求。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定》有时也被参考用于逆变器并网行为。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），規定了PCS的電氣性能、並網保護、孤島檢測及通信接口要求。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定》有時亦被參考用於逆變器並網行為。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to SS-EN 50549-1/-2 or the Svenska kraftnät grid code for Swedish market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to SS-EN 50549-1 or SS-EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory (typically accredited under EA / SWEDAC), and must satisfy the applicable Svenska kraftnät grid-code and DSO connection rules. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable law in Sweden; Chinese type-test reports against GB/T 34120 are not substitutable. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles, reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, communication protocol requirements (IEC 61850 or utility-specific vs. Chinese Modbus/CAN conventions), and cold-climate operating-temperature validation for Swedish sites.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被瑞典市场认可为SS-EN 50549-1/-2或Svenska kraftnät电网规程的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室（通常经EA / SWEDAC认可）重新测试并取得SS-EN 50549-1或SS-EN 50549-2认证，并须满足适用的Svenska kraftnät电网规程及DSO接入规则。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631在瑞典具有直接法律效力，依据GB/T 34120出具的中国型式试验报告不可替代。主要技术差距包括：电压/频率穿越曲线不同、无功功率Q(U)曲线不同、重新并网延迟设置不同、通信协议要求不同（IEC 61850或电网专有协议对比中国Modbus/CAN惯例），以及针对瑞典现场的寒冷气候工作温度验证。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被瑞典市場認可為SS-EN 50549-1/-2或Svenska kraftnät電網規程的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室（通常經EA / SWEDAC認可）重新測試並取得SS-EN 50549-1或SS-EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足適用的Svenska kraftnät電網規程及DSO接入規則。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631在瑞典具有直接法律效力，依據GB/T 34120出具的中國型式試驗報告不可替代。主要技術差距包括：電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同、無功功率Q(U)曲線不同、重新並網延遲設置不同、通信協議要求不同（IEC 61850或電網專有協議對比中國Modbus/CAN慣例），以及針對瑞典現場的寒冷氣候工作溫度驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SS-EN 50549-1/-2 are the SIS-adopted harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive / relevant Swedish grid code; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law. The Svenska kraftnät grid code (overseen by Ei) is mandatory for grid connection approval in Sweden.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules. The recommended classification has not changed in the 2023 edition.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for Swedish grid connection. Full re-testing to SS-EN 50549-1 or SS-EN 50549-2 and the applicable Svenska kraftnät grid code (overseen by Ei) is required before connecting to the Swedish grid, including cold-climate validation. Engage an accredited EU/SWEDAC test laboratory early in the product development cycle.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合瑞典并网要求。在接入瑞典电网之前，须完成SS-EN 50549-1或SS-EN 50549-2及适用Svenska kraftnät电网规程（由Ei监督）的完整重新测试，并含寒冷气候验证。建议在产品开发周期早期联系经EU/SWEDAC认可的检测实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合瑞典並網要求。在接入瑞典電網之前，須完成SS-EN 50549-1或SS-EN 50549-2及適用Svenska kraftnät電網規程（由Ei監督）的完整重新測試，並含寒冷氣候驗證。建議在產品開發週期早期聯繫經EU/SWEDAC認可的檢測實驗室。
